# Burch Studio
> Web design, development, SEO, and SaaS development studio based in Peterborough, UK. Working with businesses across the United Kingdom.

## About
Burch Studio is a web development studio based in Peterborough, Cambridgeshire, UK. We build modern, mobile-first websites for local businesses and full-stack web applications for companies across the UK. Our tech stack is Next.js, React, TypeScript, Node.js, PostgreSQL, and Tailwind CSS. We work with trade businesses, startups, and established companies.

## Services
- [Website Design & Development](https://burch-studio.co.uk/services/web-design): Custom mobile-first websites for UK businesses. No templates, no page builders. Built with Next.js.
- [SEO & Google Ranking](https://burch-studio.co.uk/services/seo): Local and national SEO for UK businesses. Technical SEO, content strategy, Google ranking.
- [Branding & Professional Setup](https://burch-studio.co.uk/services/branding): Custom domains, professional email, SSL, Google Business Profile setup.
- [Web Applications & SaaS](https://burch-studio.co.uk/services/web-apps): Full-stack TypeScript applications. Next.js, Node.js, PostgreSQL. Multi-tenant, event-driven, production-ready.

## Portfolio
- [Seqenta](https://burch-studio.co.uk/portfolio): Live SaaS platform for UK company intelligence. Real-time financial health monitoring with AI. 100+ API endpoints, 30+ background workers, 40+ UI pages. Built with Next.js, Node.js, PostgreSQL, Anthropic Claude, Auth0.
- [SoundKnowledge](https://burch-studio.co.uk/portfolio): Educational platform for a sound industry textbook published by Taylor & Francis. Admin dashboard, chapter library, Audio Vault resource library, sound wave animations. Built with Next.js, Supabase, TypeScript. Currently in development.
- [Noble Mortgages](https://burch-studio.co.uk/portfolio): Professional mortgage broker website. First web presence for the business. Generating inbound enquiries from launch.
- [Refine Barbers](https://burch-studio.co.uk/portfolio): Modern barber shop website with Booksy booking integration. First online presence for the business.

## Location
Based in Peterborough, Cambridgeshire, UK. Working with clients across the United Kingdom.
